title: Group Anagrams
description: Given an array of strings strs , group the anagrams together. You can return the answer in any order .   Example 1: Input: strs = ["eat","tea","tan","ate","nat","bat"] Output: [["bat"],["nat","tan"],["ate","eat","tea"]] Explanation: There is no string in strs that can be rearranged to form "bat" . The strings "nat" and "tan" are anagrams as they can be rearranged to form each other. The strings "ate" , "eat" , and "tea" are anagrams as they can be rearranged to form each other. Example 2: Input: strs = [""] Output: [[""]] Example 3: Input: strs = ["a"] Output: [["a"]]   Constraints: 1 <= strs.length <= 10 4 0 <= strs[i].length <= 100 strs[i] consists of lowercase English letters.
